backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no tracked features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the shadcn/ui color token system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title 'SG Exporters - PP Corrugated Sheets Export' that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Navbar, Hero, AboutUs, Products, WhyChooseUs, ExportLogistics, Certifications, TrustStats, Contact, Footer) into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section displaying company background, key selling points, trust badges, and an export markets panel for SG Exporters based in Surat, India.
frontend/src/components/Certifications.t: Certifications section showing four certification cards (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, BIS, FIEO) and a quality compliance process panel on a navy background.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a WhatsApp CTA, phone/email/address details for SG Exporters, and a client inquiry form with simulated submission handling.
Export & Logistics section detailing shipping via Mundra and Nhava Sheva ports, packaging, documentation, freight network, lead times, and supported Incoterms.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links (LinkedIn, WhatsApp), quick navigation links, and a list of export destination countries.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, subheading, CTA buttons (Request Quote, Download Catalogue), and three quick stats.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a Get Quote button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with smooth-scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Displays a grid of three PP corrugated product cards, each with an image, description, and a specifications table.
frontend/src/components/TrustStats.tsx: Shows animated counters for key business stats and a testimonials section with three client reviews from Middle Eastern buyers.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a dark-themed section highlighting five competitive advantages (durability, pricing, capacity, shipping, quality testing) as icon-based feature cards.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Inter, Montserrat), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a Navy Blue/White/Gold design token system via CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Navy/Gold color palette, Inter/Montserrat fonts, custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing SG Exporters' export business website, including its feature list, architectural notes (Navy/White/Gold palette, single-page layout), and a known deployment error.
